tutorial.title: Tutorial
tutorial.text:
TAP ‚Äî enlarge.
DRAG Hand‚ÜíField ‚Äî play.
DRAG Field‚ÜíHand ‚Äî take back.
Play Settings for more.

settings.title: Settings
settings.text: Drag to Field to open setting cards in your Hand.

language_settings.title: Language Settings
language_settings.text: Drag to Field ‚Äî get language cards in Hand.

lang_en.title: English
lang_en.text: Drag to Field ‚Äî UI and cards in English.

lang_zh.title: ‰∏≠Êñá
lang_zh.text: Drag to Field ‚Äî display in Chinese.

highlight_on.title: Highlight On
highlight_on.text: Drag to Field ‚Äî show play hints on key cards.

highlight_off.title: Highlight Off
highlight_off.text: Drag to Field ‚Äî hide play hints.

reset_world.title: Reset Cards
reset_world.text: Drag to Field ‚Äî restore starter world and clear save.

world_controller.title: World Controller
world_controller.text: Drag to Field to bootstrap the world.

starter_deck.title: Backpack
starter_deck.text: Recall to hand: field clears. Play to field: pour items, then close to restore.

guide_weave_1.title: Weave 1
guide_weave_1.text: You are the first Binder. Drag World Controller to the Field.

guide_weave_2.title: Weave 2
guide_weave_2.text: After bootstrap, drag Door to Field to play it.

guide_weave_3.title: Weave 3
guide_weave_3.text: Drag Door to Field to play. Use the backpack to stash cards.

guide_weave_4.title: Weave 4
guide_weave_4.text: Tap any card to read it large. Take cards Field‚ÜíHand anytime.

guide_weave_5.title: Weave 5
guide_weave_5.text: Open Settings for fullscreen, language, and highlights.

load_error.title: Load Error
load_error.text: Could not load game data. Check your connection and refresh.

shop_script.title: Shop Script
shop_script.text: Drag to Field ‚Äî highlights each card you should play, one at a time.

back.title: Back
back.text: Drag to Field ‚Äî return to the world.

art_console.title: Art Console
art_console.text: Drag to Field ‚Äî open the art workshop.

art_tool_pixel.title: Pixel Board
art_tool_pixel.text: Drag to Field ‚Äî open the 8√ó8 pixel editor.

art_tool_palette.title: Palette
art_tool_palette.text: Drag to Field ‚Äî cycle brush color (or tap swatches in the editor).

art_tool_export.title: Export Work
art_tool_export.text: Drag to Field ‚Äî export your painting as a card.

art_editor.title: Pixel Board
art_editor.hint: Tap cells to paint. Pick a color, then drag to draw.
